name: gap-to-skill
description: Reactive pipeline: converts a logged capability gap (from FEATURE-001 gap detection) into a registered draft skill, with mandatory non-bypassable HITL approval. Requires gap_context to be present in session state.

skills.name: gap-to-skill-pipeline
skills.note: Entry skill — restores gap context, generates scaffold seed, coordinates skill-authoring and quality-scoring. Guards: aborts if gap_to_skill_active flag is already set; aborts if gap_context is absent in session state.

skills.name: skill-authoring
skills.note: Invoked in gap_seed operation mode — Steps 0 (dedup) through 9 (registration) with seed values pre-populated from gap_context.

skills.name: quality-scoring
skills.note: Scores the draft SKILL.md output before the HITL gate. Minimum pass score 70; up to 2 revision cycles allowed.

gates.label: Skill Registration Approval
gates.note: Non-bypassable human approval gate before skill registration. Presents: skill name, domain, triggers, quality score, approval tier. Options: APPROVE / REJECT / REVISE.
